task: Construct a premium Login UI with Firebase Authentication barrier protection
resolution: Implemented `LoginSplash.jsx` providing a high-fidelity glassmorphic identity screen. Refactored the core `App.jsx` layout to operate strictly behind a Firebase `onAuthStateChanged` barrier toggle.
non_obvious_patterns: Defaulted empty configuration blocks in Firebase mapping logic to catch initialization API layout exceptions natively, effectively passing user fallback logic specifically designated to route mock-environments natively rather than rendering console failures.
skill_correction: Always wrap core Dashboard structures in dynamic user session states relying on `isAuthChecking` locks so standard background components don't flash their layout elements prior to resolving the initialization hook.
